description_long: This is a small, shrine-like obelisk structure with a rectangular base and a recessed central niche, flanked by two columns with weathered reddish-brown capitals and bases. The facade is topped with a decorative, curved pediment featuring two finials and a central crest, all showing signs of age and wear. The main body of the obelisk is constructed from stone or plaster, with visible patches of peeling paint and erosion, especially on the rear and lower sections. The roof is arched and appears to be covered in a white, possibly plaster or stucco material, with some discoloration and damage. The base sits on a patch of green, mossy ground, and there are remnants of small, broken columns or posts near the front. The overall appearance suggests a historical or commemorative function, possibly as a roadside or park monument.
description: A small, ornate obelisk with a recessed niche, flanked by columns and topped with a curved, decorative pediment. The structure is weathered, with peeling paint and mossy ground at its base.
description_view_0: Front view shows the recessed niche, flanking columns, and ornate pediment with finials; mossy ground and broken posts are visible at the base.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the depth of the niche, the thickness of the structure, and the weathered side column; some moss and broken elements are visible.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals a plain, weathered back with peeling paint and no decorative features; the base and mossy ground are also visible.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the side column, the thickness of the structure, and more broken elements near the base; the curved roof is prominent.
attribute_ornamentation: Decorative curved pediment with two finials and a central crest on the top front; flanking columns with capitals and bases; overall classical style.
attribute_base_design: Rectangular base with two small, broken column remnants at the front corners; sits on a mossy, uneven ground patch; base is simple but weathered.
attribute_tip_design: Tip features a curved, ornate pediment with two finials and a central crest; the finish is rough and weathered, with visible discoloration.
attribute_surrounding_features: Mossy ground patch and small, broken column remnants near the front base.
